form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 450m at this track beaten 16 lengths (26.49) behind Paw Nimbus in a Mix 6/7 FIN on April 2. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at Geelong to win by 1.5 lengths in 26.01, beating Zipping Windsor. Last start finished 7th on April 10 over 460m at Geelong behind Inspection beaten 8 lengths (26.47) in a Restricted WIN H. Racing well and has to be included.
